title: Add a "Color By" setting to Map View
excerpt:
Hi there, the map view seems very limited in its ability to show data besides raw numbers, so I think it would be great to add more functionality to this widget/view. 
My suggestion is to add a “Color By” setting to the …

posts.author: DrewLeFever (Drew LeFever)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there, the map view seems very limited in its ability to show data besides raw numbers, so I think it would be great to add more functionality to this widget/view.

My suggestion is to add a “Color By” setting to the Map View. Right now, by default, the map view sets colors by the color of the group that an item is in. It would be awesome to be able to color items by a Status or Person column rather than Group.

Use case: all of Person 1’s accounts can be colored differently than Person 2’s accounts.

posts.author: hbristol (Heather Bristol)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I vote for this enhancement also! Our teams and our clients are very excited by the Map View. If we could have a little more control over display it would be very powerful. Color by is my top request. Labeling choices would be next.

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

We’re super excited to share our new app with the world, Map View Pro.

It allows you to customize the color of the pins on the map (fe.: color them based on who’s assigned to an item) and choose what information is displayed when you click a pin.

Read more on our docs on what colums we support as source for the Pin Color and what columns we support for the Info Window.

You can try it for free for 14 days here, if you’re missing anything, do let us know!

Best,

Maarten
